title: Bereaved Parent Support Groups * Families/Friends of People with Cancer - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Bereaved Parent Support Groups * Families/Friends of People with Cancer 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Families/Friends of People with Cancer Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CANDLELIGHTERS FOR CHILDREN WITH CANCER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides practical and emotional support services to children and their families who have been affected by childhood cancer. Families are served from diagnosis through treatment, and bereavement through monthly support groups, family activities and events, teen groups, emergency funds, scholarships, and food pantries and meal programs at local hospitals. 10070 SW Beaverton-Hillsdale Highway Suite 360 Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: Children ages 0-21 who currently have or have had cancer and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 719-4244 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CANDLELIGHTERS FOR CHILDREN WITH CANCER CANDLELIGHTERS FOR CHILDREN WITH CANCER
